integrity.description: Agent used a GUI text editor to modify the XML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The missing dividends that must be added to the XML file are: 1) Date: 2023-09-05, Gross Amount: 119.00, Tax: 17.85. 2) Date: 2023-12-05, Gross Amount: 119.00, Tax: 17.85. The ISIN for JNJ is US4781601046.
